---
title: "生日快乐瓦伦汀!!<3"
author: "西娜"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
---

<style>
body {
  background: #EBFFFA;
  background-image:
    radial-gradient(#ff7aa2 2px, transparent 2px),
    radial-gradient(#7adfff 2px, transparent 2px),
    radial-gradient(#ffd166 2px, transparent 2px);

  background-size: 120px 120px;
  background-position:
    0 0,
    40px 60px,
    80px 20px;
}

.hero {
  padding: 80px 20px 40px;
}

.hero h1 {
  font-size: 4rem;
  color: #45CCCC;
}

.section {
  max-width: 800px;
  margin: 40px auto;
  padding: 30px;
  background: white;
  border-radius: 28px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
}

.machine {
  max-width: 420px;
  margin: 30px auto;
  padding: 30px;
  background: #FDFFA6;
  border-radius: 30px;
  border: 8px solid #FDFFA6;
  color: turquoise;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
}

.machine-window {
  background: beige;
  color: #DBFFF5;
  min-height: 120px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  padding: 25px;
  margin: 20px 0;
  font-size: 1rem;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}

button {
  background: #DBFFF5;
  color: #59D4CC;
  border: none;
  padding: 15px 24px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-weight: bold;
}

button:hover {
  transform: scale(1.05);
}

.spinning-text {
  font-size: 2.2rem;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: white;
  animation: pulse 0.8s infinite;
}

@keyframes pulse {
  0% {
    transform: scale(1);
    opacity: 0.6;
  }
  50% {
    transform: scale(1.15);
    opacity: 1;
  }
  100% {
    transform: scale(1);
    opacity: 0.6;
  }
}

.voucher {
  background: #FFEBFA;
  border: 3px dashed #FFD1FA;
  border-radius: 18px;
  padding: 18px;
  color: #333;
  animation: slideOut 0.7s ease;
}

.voucher h3 {
  margin-top: 0;
  color: #FC65DA;
}

@keyframes slideOut {
  from {
    transform: translateY(-20px) scale(0.9);
    opacity: 0;
  }
  to {
    transform: translateY(0) scale(1);
    opacity: 1;
  }
}

.photo-placeholder {
  border: 3px dashed #ffb6c9;
  padding: 40px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  color: #888;
}

.photo-gallery {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr));
  gap: 15px;
  margin-top: 20px;
}

.photo-gallery img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 1500px;
  object-fit: cover;
  border-radius: 18px;
}

</style>


<div class="hero">

# Happy Birthday Valentin!

Will i leider hüt ned bi dier sii kan do a kliini digitali Überrasching für di 💌


<div class="section">

## <3
### Mier hend scho so viel schöni Erinneriga zäma dörfa sammla, do es paar vo mina favorita hihi. Du bisch so en wunderschöna Mensch (inside and out!) und i bin eifach mega dankbar dass es di git. 

<div class="photo-gallery">
  <img src="Fotis/Museum-foti.jpg">
  <img src="Fotis/flattering.jpg">
  <img src="Fotis/frisal-selfie.jpg">
  <img src="Fotis/sixpack.jpg">
  <img src="Fotis/puglia-selfie.jpg">
</div>

<div class="section">

## Bisch parat für dis Geschenk? 🎁

<div class="machine">
  <h2>Gschenkli-Generator</h2>
  <div class="machine-window" id="result">
    Hmm was wirds wohl...?
    Spin the button to find out!
  </div>
  <button id="spinButton" onclick="spinGift()">Zeig Gschenk mann!</button>
</div>

</div>

<div class="section">

## ✨Kleiner Disclaimer✨

Du kasch so lang spinne bis mit dinem Gschenk zfrieda bisch! Kumulativi Gschenk sind in Usnahmefäll au möglich ;)

</div>

<div class="section">

## Hab dich lieb, gnüss din Tag! 💗

<script>
const gifts = [
  {
    title: "Reiserucksack",
    text: "Damit du ready bisch für China!"
  },
  {
    title: "Ventilator",
    text: "Für en küahla Kopf während da Lernphasa!"
  },
  {
    title: "Movie-Live-Konzert im KKL",
    text: "De James het ahglüta, er exSPECTREd dini Hilf bim Martinis schlürfa!"
  },
  {
    title: "Gala-Dinner @home",
    text: "Capuns, Maluns oder andera Brunz...lass dich überraschen"
  }
];

function spinGift() {
  const result = document.getElementById("result");
  const button = document.getElementById("spinButton");

  result.innerHTML = '<span style="font-size: 1.5rem; color: #59D4CC; font-weight: bold;">Trommelwirbel... 🎰</span>';
  button.disabled = true;


  setTimeout(() => {
    const gift = gifts[Math.floor(Math.random() * gifts.length)];

    result.innerHTML = `
      <div class="voucher">
        <h3>${gift.title}</h3>
        <p>${gift.text}</p>
      </div>
    `;

    button.innerHTML = "I will aber öppis anders!";
    button.disabled = false;

    confetti();
  }, 1300);
}

function confetti() {
  for (let i = 0; i < 35; i++) {
    const piece = document.createElement("div");
    piece.innerHTML = "⭐️";
    piece.style.position = "fixed";
    piece.style.left = Math.random() * 100 + "vw";
    piece.style.top = "-20px";
    piece.style.fontSize = "24px";
    piece.style.zIndex = 9999;
    piece.style.animation = `fall ${2 + Math.random() * 2}s linear forwards`;
    document.body.appendChild(piece);

    setTimeout(() => piece.remove(), 4000);
  }
}

const style = document.createElement("style");
style.innerHTML = `
@keyframes fall {
  to {
    transform: translateY(110vh) rotate(360deg);
    opacity: 0;
  }
}
`;
document.head.appendChild(style);
</script>
---

##
